home.title: Free Online Tools – Fast & No Registration
home.subtitle: Use powerful tools directly in your browser. No installation required.
home.seoTitle: Toolss – Free Online Tools for PDF, Images, Finance and More
home.seoDesc: Use Toolss tools to convert PDF files, edit images, create QR codes, calculate interest and more. 100% online, no installation, no signup.

marketing.aboutTitle: What is Toolss and what is the website goal?
marketing.aboutText: Toolss is an online tools platform designed to solve everyday tasks with speed, simplicity, and reliability. Our goal is to save your time with direct solutions for PDF, image, finance, social, and utility workflows.
marketing.benefit1Text: Access multiple tools in a single website without installing software.
marketing.benefit2Text: The interface is clear: choose your tool, provide your data, and get results in just a few steps.
marketing.benefit3Text: Use it on mobile, tablet, or desktop with the same practical experience.
marketing.howTitle: How to use Toolss tools (step by step)
marketing.how1: Choose a category and click the tool you want.
marketing.how2: Read the tool objective and usage instructions.
marketing.how3: Fill in the fields or upload your file securely.
marketing.how4: Click run (convert, compress, calculate, or generate).
marketing.how5: Review the result and download/copy when available.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.text:
At Toolss, accessible from our website, one of our main priorities is the privacy of our visitors. This Privacy Policy document contains types of information that is collected and recorded by Toolss and how we use it.

If you have additional questions or require more information about our Privacy Policy, do not hesitate to contact us.

This Privacy Policy applies only to our online activities and is valid for visitors to our website with regards to the information that they shared and/or collect in Toolss. This policy is not applicable to any information collected offline or via channels other than this website.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.text:
Welcome to Toolss!

These terms and conditions outline the rules and regulations for the use of Toolss's Website.

By accessing this website we assume you accept these terms and conditions. Do not continue to use Toolss if you do not agree to take all of the terms and conditions stated on this page.

The following terminology applies to these Terms and Conditions, Privacy Statement and Disclaimer Notice and all Agreements: "Client", "You" and "Your" refers to you, the person log on this website and compliant to the Company's terms and conditions.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.text:
This is the Cookie Policy for Toolss.

What Are Cookies
As is common practice with almost all professional websites this site uses cookies, which are tiny files that are downloaded to your computer, to improve your experience. This page describes what information they gather, how we use it and why we sometimes need to store these cookies. We will also share how you can prevent these cookies from being stored however this may downgrade or 'break' certain elements of the sites functionality.

How We Use Cookies
We use cookies for a variety of reasons detailed below. Unfortunately in most cases there are no industry standard options for disabling cookies without completely disabling the functionality and features they add to this site.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.text:
If you have any questions about our tools, privacy policy, or terms of use, please feel free to contact us.

Email: support@alltools.com

We aim to respond to all inquiries within 48 hours.
